heading: Troubleshoot Errors
body:
**Reason:** One or more given URL (Uniform Resource Locator)s contain insecure HTTP (HyperText Transport Protocol) scheme.

```json
{
        "ok" : 0,
        "errmsg" : "store 'httpStore': the insecure HTTP scheme is not supported by default - please add a 'allowInsecure: true' flag to the store or datasource to query from such URLs, correlationID = 16332c6eddf7b32776fde638",
        "code" : 72,
        "codeName" : "InvalidOptions"
}
```

**Solution:** Specify URL (Uniform Resource Locator)s with the secure HTTPS (Secure HyperText Transport Protocol) scheme. If the
specified URL (Uniform Resource Locator)s have the insecure HTTP (HyperText Transport Protocol) scheme, set the `allowInsecure` flag to `true`. Note that setting the
`allowInsecure` flag to `true` leaves your data vulnerable to
man-in-the-middle attacks.
